_comment: Each fixture is a representative ANSI-stripped Claude Code terminal tail. expectedState is the app ActivityState the classifier verdict must map to (via TerminalStateDetector.MapVerdictToActivityState). The bypass_footer and plan_mode cases are the regression guards: a mode footer must NEVER map to WaitingForPerm.

fixtures.note: REGRESSION: bypass-permissions mode footer is NOT a permission prompt
plan mode footer is NOT a prompt; empty input box
